alerts.none: No active alerts for your area

security.title: Security Alert
security.advice_banditry: Armed bandits reported in this area. Avoid road travel at night. Lock doors. Call 112.
security.advice_insurgency: Insurgency activity reported. Stay indoors. Avoid public spaces. Follow security forces instructions.
security.advice_communal: Communal conflict reported. Avoid flashpoint areas. Seek shelter. Call 112 or 08000-NEMA.
security.advice_unrest: Civil unrest reported. Avoid crowds and protest areas. Stay indoors until further notice.
security.advice_kidnapping: Kidnapping risk elevated. Travel in convoy. Vary your routine. Report suspicious activity to 112.
security.advice_terrorism: Terrorism threat active. Avoid public gatherings. Be alert to unattended packages. Call 112 immediately.
security.source_acled: Source: ACLED (Armed Conflict Location & Event Data)
security.opt_in_hint: Security alerts are sent separately and require your consent

report.title: Report an Incident
report.subtitle: Help your community — report hazards or security incidents you observe
report.description_placeholder: Be specific: location, time, what you saw, how many people affected…
report.location_hint: We use this to map your report to the nearest LGA
report.success: Report submitted. Thank you for helping your community.
report.anonymous_note: Reports are anonymous. Your phone number is never shared.
report.security_warning: Security reports are forwarded to relevant authorities.

heatwave.title: Heat Warning
heatwave.advice: Stay indoors 11am–4pm. Drink water regularly. Check on elderly neighbours.

subscribe.title: SMS Alerts
subscribe.success: Subscribed! You will receive SMS alerts for {{lga}}.
subscribe.ussd_hint: No smartphone? Dial *384*FLOOD# on any phone.

offline.banner: You are offline. Showing last cached data ({{age}} ago).
offline.cached_maps: Offline flood maps available for 148 high-risk LGAs

voice.red_dual_auth_notice: RED ALERT: Two officers must independently approve this alert.
voice.compose_placeholder: Write the emergency alert in clear, direct English. Example: FLOOD WARNING: HIGH RISK for Kogi LGA. River rising. Evacuate low-lying areas immediately. Go to nearest shelter. Call 08000-NEMA.
voice.compose_guidance_red: RED ALERT: Be direct and urgent. Include: what, where, what to do, where to go, who to call.
voice.compose_guidance_orange: HIGH RISK: Include action steps and shelter information.
voice.compose_guidance_yellow: MODERATE: Include advisory and monitoring instructions.
voice.compose_guidance_green: LOW RISK: General awareness and seasonal preparation.
voice.tip_action_first: Lead with the action (EVACUATE / STAY INDOORS / MONITOR)
voice.tip_location: Name the specific LGA or community
voice.tip_shelter: Include shelter location or NEMA contact
voice.over_limit: {{over}} characters over limit — shorten before generating
voice.loanword_hint: Note: '{{words}}' will be translated (not used as loanwords in HA/YO/IG)

progress.translating: Step 2: Translating into Hausa, Yoruba, Igbo, Pidgin…

voice.copy_for_radio: Copy script text for radio station broadcast
voice.reject_reason_required: A reason is required before rejecting.
voice.reject_placeholder: Explain why this alert is being rejected (e.g. incorrect location, translation error, severity mismatch)…
voice.override_warning: EMERGENCY OVERRIDE — This bypasses all governance gates. A post-incident audit report is required within 24 hours.
voice.override_audit_notice: This action is permanently logged and cannot be undone.
voice.override_justification_placeholder: State the operational reason for bypassing the approval process…
voice.override_confirm_check: I understand this is an emergency override and I accept responsibility for the post-incident audit.
voice.dispatched_subtitle: All 5 language clips approved and queued. Dispatching now.
voice.override_dispatched_notice: Audit report required within 24 hours. Contact your supervisor.
